subject: Testing strategy for checkout retries
position: Prefer a narrow regression test around retry timing before broad refactoring.
assumptions: The failing behavior is localized to retry timing until runtime evidence says otherwise.
concerns: Broad refactoring may hide the failing oracle before it is understood.

proposals.title: Add a focused retry-timing regression test first
proposals.why: It preserves the observable failure while keeping the implementation change small.
tradeoffs: May need a second pass if the failure is caused by orchestration rather than timing.

risks: If the current evidence is stale, this may optimize around the wrong behavior.
stop_conditions: Stop and update claims if runtime evidence contradicts the localized retry-timing assumption.
note: Proposal records capture constructive agent critique and options. They are not proof or permission.
